boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Execution release REL-AST-081 does not precisely map all critical terms (AS-44, 0-20 liter band, Facility R9, cabinet/handler controls) to the purchase order PO-AST-081, leaving the hazard-control status ambiguous.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Execution release REL-AST-081 is missing exact term bindings for AS-44, 0-20 liter band, Facility R9, and cabinet/handler controls, which are required by policy STD-AST-081-P for controlled solvent purchases.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The action boundary requires exact source-record matching for controlled purchases. The execution release REL-AST-081 fails to provide this exact match for critical terms, thus the action cannot proceed.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The execution release must precede PO execution and precisely match all specified terms, including hazard-control status, as per STD-AST-081-P.

final_answer: The controlled-solvent purchase cannot proceed. The execution release (REL-AST-081) fails to provide an exact match for critical terms including the solvent type (AS-44), quantity band (0-20L), facility (R9), and handler controls. This lack of precise mapping, as required by policy (STD-AST-081-P), leaves the hazard-control status unverified, necessitating an ESCALATE verdict.
open_blockers: Missing exact term mappings for AS-44, 0-20L, Facility R9, and cabinet/handler controls.
Hazard-control status remains unverified due to incomplete term mapping.
